description: The Frankfurt mafia is a Macedonian crime group founded in the mid-1990s in Veles, North Macedonia, involved in heroin trafficking in Frankfurt, Germany, and Vienna, Austria. It controlled up to 90% of Frankfurt's drug trade and 19 of 24 blocks in Vienna's heroin market. Despite mass arrests in 2010 and 2013, the group remains active and has adapted its tactics.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Frankfurt mafia controlled 19 out of 24 blocks in Vienna's drug trade using intelligence methods.
country_links.context: The Frankfurt mafia controlled 19 out of 24 blocks in Vienna's drug trade using intelligence methods.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Frankfurt mafia held about 90% of the drug trade market in Frankfurt
country_links.context: The Frankfurt mafia controlled the heroin trade in Frankfurt and held about 90% of the drug trade market there.
